visit_summary: Don't drive yet — ask the seller about key gaps before committing.
alignment_summary: The listing description perfectly matches the photos, which clearly show all listed animal figures and verify the working lights.

reasons.text: The barn's lanterns are clearly illuminated in the first photo, confirming the toy's electrical components are functional.
All listed animal figures (chicken, mouse, sheep, horse, cow, rabbit) are present and visible across the photos.
The toy appears clean with no visible structural cracks, heavy scuffs, or damaged plastic parts.

seller_questions: Do the sound effects and music still play properly when the animals are placed in their spots?
Is the battery compartment clean and free of any rust or corrosion?
Will you be including the batteries with the barn?
seller_message_draft: Hi! I'm interested in your toy barn playset. Do the sound effects and music still play properly, and is the battery compartment clean? If so, I'd love to arrange a time to pick it up. Thanks!
limitations: We cannot verify if the toy's sound effects or music features are fully functional from photos alone.
The battery compartment's condition (potential corrosion) cannot be seen.
The listing does not specify if batteries are included with the purchase.
A small blue character shown in the second photo is not mentioned in the text description.
research_recommended: Look up the B. Toys Baa-Baa-Barn to see all original features and sound functions.
Check online retail prices for a new or used B. Toys Baa-Baa-Barn to ensure the seller's price is fair.
future_capability_note: We don't verify prices, recalls, or seller history yet — you'll need to check these yourself. A future version of this product will do that research for you.
